recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: Women in a failing silk factory, fight to find a way to keep their jobs.

recommendations.title: Caravaggio's Shadow
recommendations.overview: The Catholic Church secretly investigates Caravaggio as the Pope weighs whether to grant him clemency for killing a rival.

recommendations.title: Romanzo Criminale
recommendations.overview: After serving prison time for a juvenile offense, Freddo gathers his old buddies Libano and Dandi and embarks on a crime spree that makes the trio the most powerful gangsters in Rome. Libano loves their new status, and seeks to spread their influence

recommendations.title: The Lookout
recommendations.overview: When police is about to apprehend a famous gang of bank robbers, an elite sniper opens fire from a roof, thus facilitating the flee of his accomplices. However, one of them is seriously injured, which compromises the plans of the thieves.

recommendations.title: Carlito's Way
recommendations.overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

recommendations.title: On My Skin
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story behind the most controversial Italian court cases in recent years. Stefano Cucchi was arrested for a minor crime and mysteriously found dead during his detention. In one week's time, a family is changed forever.

recommendations.title: The Old Man & the Gun
recommendations.overview: The true story of Forrest Tucker, from his audacious escape from San Quentin at the age of 70 to an unprecedented string of heists that confounded authorities and enchanted the public. Wrapped up in the pursuit are a detective, who becomes captivated

recommendations.title: The Ruthless

recommendations.title: Genitori & figli - Agitare bene prima dell'uso
recommendations.overview: Parent-teenage children clashes in 21st century Italy.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.
